nasb.text: When He had finished speaking, He said to Simon, “Put out into the deep water and let down your nets for a catch.”

esv.text: And when he had finished speaking, he said to Simon, “Put out into the deep and let down your nets for a catch.”

cnv.text: 講完了，就對西門說：“把船開到水深的地方，下網打魚！”

ccb.text: 耶稣讲完之后对西门说：“把船划到水深的地方去撒网捕鱼。”

csbs.text: 讲完了以后，他对西门说：“把船划到水深的地方，下网捕鱼吧。”
